Soft and silent, no damage to the floor, smooth and comfortable sliding

Title: JMMD 6 in 1 Toddler Bike with Push Handle for Kids 18-60 Months, 12" Foldable Balance Bike with Training Wheels, Pedals, Brakes, Kickstand, Push Tricycle Toddler Gift & Toys for Boy & Girl
Features: GROWS WITH YOUR CHILD: No need to buy multiple kid bikes! This 6-in-1 convertible design easily transforms from a parent-push trike to a toddler tricycle, balance bike, toddler bike and more — perfectly suited for ages 18 to 60 months. It’s the only bike your child will need through their early years. | ADJUSTABLE STEERING HANDLE FOR SAFE CONTROL: The parent push handle rotates 135° for easy control of the toddler push bike’s speed and direction, helping protect your child from tipping or losing balance. It can also be adjusted to match parents’ height for comfortable guiding. Both the handlebar and seat are height-adjustable, and it comes with a seat extension rod for a perfect fit for kids of different heights. | SAFETY FIRST, ALWAYS: Built with parents’ peace of mind in mind. Equipped with an aluminum alloy frame, 12" all-terrain puncture-proof rubber wheels, a hand brake, and 60° steering limiter to prevent sudden turns. The gear-driven, chain-free system keeps your child safe while offering smoother control. Every detail of JMMD kids bicycle is designed for stability, safety, and comfort. | EASY TO ASSEMBLE & FOLD: Arrives 95% pre-assembled — just attach the handlebar, seat, push rod, and pedals, and it’s ready to ride. With one press of the red button under the frame, the toddler bike with training wheels folds instantly, making it easy to carry or store in your car trunk. Setup takes just minutes — no tools, no stress, just fun. Perfect for travel and family outings. | THE PERFECT GIFT FOR GROWING KIDS: Designed with training wheels and a kickstand, JMMD 6-in-1 toddler bicycle offers a smooth and safe transition from tricycle to balance bike to real bike. It helps your little one build balance and confidence step by step — from guided rides to independent adventures. A thoughtful gift for birthdays, Christmas, or first-bike surprises — more than a toy, it’s a memory that grows with your child.

evidenceHighlights.text: GROWS WITH YOUR CHILD: No need to buy multiple kid bikes! This 6-in-1 convertible design easily transforms from a parent-push trike to a toddler tricycle, balance bike, toddler bike and more — perfectly suited for ages 18 to 60 months. It’s the only bike your child will need through their early years.

ADJUSTABLE STEERING HANDLE FOR SAFE CONTROL: The parent push handle rotates 135° for easy control of the toddler push bike’s speed and direction, helping protect your child from tipping or losing balance. It can also be adjusted to match parents’ height for comfortable guiding. Both the handlebar and seat are height-adjustable, and it comes with a seat extension rod for a perfect fit for kids of different heights.

SAFETY FIRST, ALWAYS: Built with parents’ peace of mind in mind. Equipped with an aluminum alloy frame, 12" all-terrain puncture-proof rubber wheels, a hand brake, and 60° steering limiter to prevent sudden turns. The gear-driven, chain-free system keeps your child safe while offering smoother control. Every detail of JMMD kids bicycle is designed for stability, safety, and comfort.

EASY TO ASSEMBLE & FOLD: Arrives 95% pre-assembled — just attach the handlebar, seat, push rod, and pedals, and it’s ready to ride. With one press of the red button under the frame, the toddler bike with training wheels folds instantly, making it easy to carry or store in your car trunk. Setup takes just minutes — no tools, no stress, just fun. Perfect for travel and family outings.

THE PERFECT GIFT FOR GROWING KIDS: Designed with training wheels and a kickstand, JMMD 6-in-1 toddler bicycle offers a smooth and safe transition from tricycle to balance bike to real bike. It helps your little one build balance and confidence step by step — from guided rides to independent adventures. A thoughtful gift for birthdays, Christmas, or first-bike surprises — more than a toy, it’s a memory that grows with your child.

Texts: The outside is for everyone, but not everyone feels comfortable outside. So we set out to make everyone feel at home in the open air through the use of expertly designed, durably crafted, accessibly priced gear. Our goal is simple: make nature second nature for everyone. We believe that all people, regardless of background or experience, should enjoy the life-affirming, eye-opening beauty of the outside world.

Product_Description: Meet Cricket, Retrospec’s baby balance bike and ride-on toy designed for budding riders ages 12–24 months. This beginner balance bike helps toddlers practice balance, steering, and coordination while building confidence from their very first ride. With four stable wheels, rounded components, and soft, no-scratch tires, Cricket is designed to be difficult to tip and gentle on indoor floors. Its low, feet-to-floor design lets little ones push, scoot, and glide at their own pace indoors or outdoors, without pedals or training wheels getting in the way. Lightweight and easy for parents to carry to the park, playdates, or grandparents’ house, it’s an ideal first bike and a thoughtful first birthday gift for 1-year-old boys and girls. Focused on balance and confidence over flashy distractions, Cricket helps make the transition to a big-kid bike smoother and more natural.

CONFIDENCE-BUILDING RIDE-ON TOY: Helps toddlers practice balance, steering, and coordination while building confidence from their very first ride, preparing them for future bikes

Meet Cricket, Retrospec’s baby balance bike and ride-on toy designed for budding riders ages 12–24 months. This beginner balance bike helps toddlers practice balance, steering, and coordination while building confidence from their very first ride. With four stable wheels, rounded components, and soft, no-scratch tires, Cricket is designed to be difficult to tip and gentle on indoor floors. Its low, feet-to-floor design lets little ones push, scoot, and glide at their own pace indoors or outdoors, without pedals or training wheels getting in the way. Lightweight and easy for parents to carry to the park, playdates, or grandparents’ house, it’s an ideal first bike and a thoughtful first birthday gift for 1-year-old boys and girls. Focused on balance and confidence over flashy distractions, Cricket helps make the transition to a big-kid bike smoother and more natural.

Features: VERSATILE 2-IN-1 MODE -This innovative 2-in-1 kids' trike and balance bike meets dual needs with a single bike. An ideal toddler toy that grows with your child, helping them build confidence and coordination at their own pace.
